who: procurement teams in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10-20 vendor contracts/month
offer: For procurement teams in mid-sized accounting firms processing 10-20 vendor contracts/month, missed renewals cause supplier penalties. We automate renewal task reminders instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and calendar reminders.
problem: Difficulty in tracking vendor contract expirations and managing renewals.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement teams
Indie Hackers posts about workflow solutions
DM outreach to procurement teams with demo video
Community forums for sharing procurement tools
try_it: Let users try task reminder creation and simple dashboard for contract overview on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
